## M.E. Computer Science & Engineering

2 Years

Intake: 18

Advanced computing, research methodology, machine learning, and specializations in emerging technologies. This program prepares students for research and senior technical roles.

### Eligibility

B.E./B.Tech in CSE/IT or equivalent with minimum 50% marks

### Specializations

Artificial IntelligenceData ScienceCloud ComputingCybersecurity

### Career Opportunities

* Senior Software Engineer
* Research Scientist
* Technical Architect
* Data Scientist

Research FocusIndustry ProjectsTeaching Opportunities

[Apply Now](/admissions/apply)[Fee Structure](/admissions/fee-structure)

ME-VLSIPostgraduate

## M.E. VLSI Design

2 Years

Intake: 18

Chip design, verification, ASIC/FPGA development, and advanced electronics. VLSI engineers are highly sought after in semiconductor and embedded systems industries.

### Eligibility

B.E./B.Tech in ECE/EEE or equivalent with minimum 50% marks

### Specializations

Digital IC DesignAnalog IC DesignPhysical DesignVerification

### Career Opportunities

* VLSI Design Engineer
* Verification Engineer
* Physical Design Engineer
* ASIC Engineer

EDA Tools TrainingSemiconductor Industry ConnectProject-Based Learning

[Apply Now](/admissions/apply)[Fee Structure](/admissions/fee-structure)

MBAPostgraduate

## MBA - Master of Business Administration

2 Years

Intake: 60

Comprehensive business management program with specializations in marketing, finance, HR, and operations. Develop leadership skills and business acumen for management careers.

### Eligibility

Bachelor's degree in any discipline with minimum 50% marks. Valid TANCET/CAT/MAT score.

### Specializations

MarketingFinanceHuman ResourcesOperations Management

### Career Opportunities

* Business Analyst
* Marketing Manager
* Financial Analyst
* HR Manager

Industry InternshipsCase Study MethodLeadership Development

[Apply Now](/admissions/apply)[Fee Structure](/admissions/fee-structure)

## Why Pursue PG at JCE?

### Research Excellence

State-of-the-art research facilities and guidance from experienced faculty.

### Industry Connect

Strong industry partnerships for internships, projects, and placements.

### Expert Faculty

Learn from PhD holders with industry and research experience.

## Advance Your Career with a PG Degree

Applications are open for the 2026-27 academic year. Secure your seat through TANCA counselling or management quota.
